petitions.title: Petitions
petitions.subtitle: Sign our petitions to strengthen advocacy for military families.
petitions.name: Full name
petitions.success: Thank you! Your signature has been recorded.

home.heroQuote: Behind every soldier stands a family whose only inheritance is the blood shed under the flag — the sign of the greatest love, the supreme sacrifice.
home.missionSubtitle: Turning a community concern into a lever for social, economic development and national cohesion.
home.missionBody: Founded in 2018, CFM analyses weaknesses in social and everyday life sectors affecting military dependents. Our studies lead to nationally significant conclusions, with advocacy before national and international bodies.
home.newsletterSubtitle: Receive our news and advocacy alerts.
home.liveSectionSubtitle: Follow our live streams and replays.

contact.title: Contact & help request
contact.subtitle: Contact CFM or submit a confidential help request. We commit to responding within 7 business days.
contact.generalSubtitle: For press, partnerships or any other inquiry.

engage.title: Get involved with CFM
engage.subtitle: Join our community: become a member, supporter or volunteer to defend military families' rights.
engage.memberSubtitle: Create an account to access your private space, link your family, sign petitions and track donations.
engage.donateSubtitle: Support our work via Mobile Money (Orange, M-Pesa, Airtel).

auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your email to receive a reset link.
auth.resetSubtitle: Choose a password of at least 8 characters.
auth.success: If this email exists, a link has been sent.

live.title: Live & events
live.subtitle: Follow our live streams and replays.

axes.title: Our focus areas
axes.subtitle: CFM offers pragmatic solutions to permanently improve social, economic, environmental, educational and health outcomes for military dependents.

actions.title: National & regional actions
actions.subtitle: Map of CFM actions across the 26 provinces of DRC.
actions.empty: No actions recorded for this selection.
actions.mapSubtitle: province(s) with recorded actions — 26 DRC provinces

advocacy.title: Advocacy & studies
advocacy.subtitle: Our analyses, conclusions and campaigns to influence national and international policy for military families.
advocacy.ctaTitle: Are you a decision-maker or institution?
advocacy.ctaBody: Contact our advocacy team for full reports.

memberArea.pendingBanner: Your account is pending approval by the CFM team.
memberArea.volunteerBanner: Volunteer area: access the limited dashboard.

engageExtra.quickSignupDesc: Password-free alternative — manually validated by CFM team.
engageExtra.transparencyBody: CFM is committed to full transparency with donors. Every contribution supports advocacy, studies and direct family support.
engageExtra.annualReport: Annual report available on request from the admin team.
engageExtra.partnerBody: Institutions, NGOs and companies: contact us to explore a partnership.
engageExtra.demoPayment: Demo mode: simulated payment. Set MOBILE_MONEY_MODE=production and PayDunya for production.
engageExtra.prodPayment: Secure payment via PayDunya (Orange Money, M-Pesa, Airtel).
engageExtra.sandboxPayment: Test mode: payment through the PayDunya sandbox, no real charge.

footer.tagline: Defending the rights of military dependents
footer.quote: Behind every soldier stands a family.
footer.newsletterDesc: Stay informed about our actions and campaigns.

memberPromo.body: Go further after your action: track your requests and stay informed about mobilisations.
memberPromo.benefit2: Receive live alerts and upcoming petitions

transparency.impactBody: Every contribution directly funds advocacy, studies and support for military families on the ground.

famille.label: Military family
famille.description: For spouses, children, widows and orphans of military personnel. Family link information required.

soutien.label: Supporter
soutien.description: For anyone wishing to support the cause without military family information.

benevole.label: Volunteer
benevole.description: To join the team and actively contribute to CFM's actions.

social.title: Social
social.description: Improving living conditions for spouses, widows, orphans and children of military personnel.

economique.title: Economic
economique.description: Empowering women and widows through entrepreneurship and economic resources.
details: Advocacy for fair access to aid

education.title: Education
education.description: Ensuring access to education and training for children of military personnel.

environnement.title: Environment
environnement.description: Improving living conditions in and around military camps and quarters.
details: Green spaces and quality of life

sante.title: Health
sante.description: Sexual and reproductive health of women in military camp environments.
